# StarRay Hotel full machine-readable summary

StarRay Hotel is a hospitality brand and operating platform built for Indonesia. The site is available in English, Simplified Chinese, and Indonesian.

## Positioning
- Built for reliability. Designed for peace of mind.
- The brand promise is "Certainty in the City".
- Target outcome: dependable, predictable, and reassuring guest stays.

## About
StarRay combines brand capability, operating systems, local execution, supply-chain integration, and technology-enabled management. Current operating foundation:
- Established: 2025
- Operating hotels: 2
- Current rooms: 256
- Total projects: 7

Founder:
- Bill Lin
- Co-Investor at Delonix Bravo Investment, in joint investment with Alex Zheng (Founder & Chairman of Delonix Group) in the Nusantara mixed-use project.
- Former President of Delonix Group Indonesia.
- Former CEO of Plateno Group International.

## Brand standards
REST / Certainty in Sleep
- Premium bedding standard
- Comprehensive soundproofing
- Standardized air quality and precise lighting controls

RELAX / Certainty in Comfort
- Unified signature scent profile
- Stable water pressure and temperature
- Consistent, uncompromised cleanliness standards

RESET / Certainty in Recovery
- Seamless arrival and departure
- Breakfast quality held to a consistent benchmark
- Clear, efficient, and reliable service rhythms

## Projects
- StarRay Hotel Mangga Dua, Jakarta, operating asset
- IKN Mixed-use Project, Nusantara, strategic investment participation
- StarRay Hotel Kebayoran, Jakarta, pipeline asset

## Competitive edge logic
1. Market Paradox
- Capital misallocation
- Low operating efficiency
- Dependency on OTA without ownership

2. The Long Game
- Targeted Brand Focus
- Membership Asset
- IT System & AI

3. Capability Foundation
- China chain-hotel expertise
- Indonesia local execution capability

4. Execution Excellence
- 30–40% lower cost-per-key
- 3–8 month launch cycle
- 10–15% higher occupancy and ADR potential
- 45–60% GOP target margin

## Contact
Bill.lin@starrayhotel.com
